title: You Are Cute, Senpai
overview: Ayumu has an uphill battle ahead of him if he insists on beating Urushi in a shogi match before confessing to her. Especially since she already has her suspicions.

title: I Want to Make You Happy, Senpai
overview: Urushi needs more members to officialize the shogi club. But she’ll have to survive Sport’s Day first!

title: I Want to Go on a First Date, Senpai
overview: Ayumu and Urushi are going to the school festival together. But it’s not a date—they’re just, uh, trying to recruit more members for their club! Yeah, that’s it!

title: I Want to Spend Time Together, Senpai
overview: It’s the end of the year, and that means Christmas is coming. If Ayumu makes the right moves, he and Urushi could actually make some progress.

title: I Want to Know More, Senpai
overview: A new year marks a new beginning and Urushi coincidentally runs into Ayumu when she’s out and about!

title: I Want to Get It From You, Senpai
overview: Valentine’s Day is here and that can only mean two things: chocolates and anxiety.

title: It’s a Role I Refuse to Relinquish, Senpai
overview: The shogi club is now official, but Urushi realizes she must earn Rin’s respect. Meanwhile, Rin wants to know exactly what’s going on between Ayumu and Urushi.

title: I Want to Make Memories, Senpai
overview: Golden Week is here, and that means the shogi club can relax and have fun!

title: I Can’t Back Down, Senpai
overview: Tension is in the air when Ayumu meets Urushi’s father.

title: I Want to Get Stronger, Senpai
overview: Urushi’s thoughts drift towards a certain someone while she’s on a school trip. Meanwhile, Ayumu and Rin bond while practicing shogi.

title: I Want to Win and Tell You How I Feel, Senpai
overview: Ayumu is determined to win a shogi match once Urushi returns from the school trip. But then Rin asks him an important question.
